description:
Multiple protoMaker instances (ava-staging, developer local, CI bot) all see the same repo's PRs. Without coordination, two instances can both nudge or fix the same PR simultaneously — stepping on each other.

## Solution: Instance-stamped ownership with stale decay

### 1. Instance identity in settings

Add to the appropriate GlobalSettings or AppSettings domain file (in libs/types/src/ — check which domain file holds those types after PR #1186 lands):
- instanceId (string, optional) — e.g. "ava-staging". Auto-generated UUID if not set.
- teamId (string, optional) — e.g. "proto-labs-ai". Groups instances by org.
- prOwnershipStaleTtlHours (number, optional, default 24)

In apps/server/src/services/settings-service.ts, add getInstanceId() that returns the configured value or auto-generates and persists a UUID on first call.

### 2. PR body watermark when creating PRs

In apps/server/src/routes/github/routes/create-pr-from-worktree.ts (or wherever gh pr create is called), append a hidden HTML comment to the PR body:

automaker:owner instance=ava-staging team=proto-labs-ai created=2026-02-25T19:00:00Z

Wrap it in an HTML comment tag so it's invisible in rendered markdown but parseable by any instance.

### 3. Parse ownership in check-pr-status

In apps/server/src/routes/github/routes/check-pr-status.ts, parse the watermark from the PR body and add an ownership field to the response:
- instanceId (string or null)
- teamId (string or null)
- createdAt (string or null)
- isOwnedByThisInstance (boolean)
- isStale (boolean) — true when lastCommitAge AND lastActivityAge both exceed staleTtl

### 4. pr-ownership.ts utility (new file)

Create apps/server/src/routes/github/utils/pr-ownership.ts with three pure functions:
- parsePROwnershipWatermark(body: string): PROwnership
- buildPROwnershipWatermark(instanceId: string, teamId: string): string
- isPRStale(lastCommitAgeHours: number, lastActivityAgeHours: number, staleTtlHours: number): boolean

### 5. Docs

Add docs/dev/multi-instance-pr-coordination.md documenting the ownership model, stale decay, and nudge rules (rebase on stale, skip if owned by another instance).

## Acceptance Criteria

- GlobalSettings or AppSettings type has instanceId, teamId, prOwnershipStaleTtlHours with Zod validation
- getInstanceId() on SettingsService auto-generates and persists a UUID if not configured
- create-pr-from-worktree stamps the watermark in new PR bodies
- check-pr-status response includes ownership object
- pr-ownership.ts has all three utility functions with unit tests
- docs/dev/multi-instance-pr-coordination.md created
- npm run build:server passes
- npm run test:server passes

## Notes

If PR #1186 (settings types split) has not yet merged into main, add the new fields to libs/types/src/settings.ts directly. Do NOT add ownership to feature.json — the PR body watermark is the single source of truth. Default staleTtlHours to 24 in the service layer.
title: feat: multi-instance PR ownership — stamp, claim, and stale-decay coordination
